behavior_summary: U8P_WARDNS::look: When the player examines the object, the script emits a short descriptive bark "wardrobe" and then suspends/ends the U8P_WARDNS::look process.

U8P_WARDNS::use: When the player uses/activates the object, the script reads the item's status word, tests bit 0x0100, and toggles the item's UI/gump: if the bit is set it calls Item::closeGump(this), otherwise it calls Item::openGump(0x0D, this).
Overall: The item provides a short examine description and a simple toggle for an associated UI window based on an item status flag.
notable_control_flow: U8P_WARDNS::look executes as a process-type 'U8P_WARDNS::look' handler: it performs a single Bark ("wardrobe") and then suspends/terminates — no branching or external calls.

U8P_WARDNS::use executes as a utility/U8P_WARDNS::use handler: it performs local1 = Item::getStatus(this); evaluates (local1 & 0x0100); if true calls Item::closeGump(this); else calls Item::openGump(0x0D, this).
No global flags are read or written by these routines; no menus or player-choice branching is present.
open_questions: What exact player action triggers U8P_WARDNS::use (double-click, context-U8P_WARDNS::use, or an engine "U8P_WARDNS::use" event)? This is not encoded in the extracted script.
What semantics does the status bit 0x0100 represent on this item ("gump open" flag inferred but not authoritative)?
What is the content/behavior of gump id 0x0D (UI layout/function) opened by Item::openGump(0x0D, this)?
local1 is inferred to be a status/word holder — its precise type and additional status bits are unknown.

main_function.name: U8P_WARDNS::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short examine/description when the player inspects the object (emit the bark "wardrobe").
entry_conditions: Invoked by the engine as the object's 'U8P_WARDNS::look' (examine) handler (process type 0x0208).
Likely triggered when the player targets the object with a 'U8P_WARDNS::look' or examine interaction (or enters a U8P_WARDNS::look-type fast area).

function_map.name: U8P_WARDNS::use
function_map.role: U8P_WARDNS::use/activate handler (toggle the item's UI/gump based on a status bit)

function_map.name: Item::getStatus
function_map.role: external API to read an item's status/flags

function_map.name: Item::closeGump
function_map.role: external API to close an item's UI/gump

function_map.name: Item::openGump
function_map.role: external API to open a specific UI/gump for the item

external_calls.purpose: Read the item's status/flags into a local word for testing.
Close the item's UI/gump when the status bit 0x0100 indicates the UI is currently open (inferred).
Open gump id 0x0D for the item when the status bit 0x0100 is not set (inferred).
